description_long: This is a single-story residential house surrounded by a fenced yard with a variety of mature trees and landscaped greenery. The house features a dark, hip-style roof and a light-colored exterior, with a prominent entry path leading to the main door. A rectangular swimming pool is situated in the backyard, accompanied by a paved patio area and additional green space. The property is enclosed by a solid fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The landscaping includes both deciduous and evergreen trees, as well as manicured lawns and paved walkways. The overall layout is spacious, with the house centrally positioned and outdoor amenities distributed around it.
description: A single-story house with a dark hip roof, light exterior, fenced yard, landscaped trees, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry path, front lawn, and a variety of trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and the fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and the back facade of the house with surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, green space, and the side of the house with additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a paved path, small porch, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping.
